Entry.JapaneseText: というわけで〜。 他の作品の主人公をぶっ倒して 主役の座を奪っちゃおうと思いま〜す
Entry.EnglishText: And sooo... I'm gonna go out there and beat the main characters of the other games, and steal the leading role.

Entry.JapaneseText: ロイドくんはもちろん協力してくれるよね？
Entry.EnglishText: Lloyd-kun, you'll be there to help me of course, right?

Entry.JapaneseText: それは構わないけどさ。 普通主役を奪いにいくんだったら 真っ先にシンフォニアを狙うんじゃないか？
Entry.EnglishText: I don't mind, but I would've figured that you'd go for stealing Symphonia's lead role first.

Entry.JapaneseText: んも〜。 なに言っちゃってんのよ、ロイドくん
Entry.EnglishText: Oh goodness no. 〜 What are you saying, Lloyd-kun?

Entry.JapaneseText: 俺さまが ロイドくんを裏切ってまで 主役になりたがるわけないでしょ
Entry.EnglishText: I wouldn't up and betray you and wanna take your lead role like that, you know.

Entry.JapaneseText: よーし、わかった！ 俺に出来る事だったらなんでも協力するぜ！
Entry.EnglishText: Alright, I gotcha! If there's anything I can do, I'll help you out!

Entry.JapaneseText: さすがハニー！ 頼りにしてるよ！
Entry.EnglishText: Just like I'd expect from ya, Honey! I'll be relying on ya!
Entry.Notes: Zelos does actually call Lloyd "Honey", and that's his nickname for Lloyd.

Entry.JapaneseText: そんじゃあまずは シリーズの原点から当たってみますかね
Entry.EnglishText: Then first, let's strike at the very beginnings of the series.
